name: Main.error.restartAdmin
en_US:
Faulty CATS installation found!
To fix this restart Blender as admin!
ko_KR:
잘못 설치된 Cats Plugin이 발견되었습니다!
이 문제를 해결하려면 Blender를 관리자로 다시 시작하세요!
cn_CN:
检测到 CATS 插件安装损坏！
修复方法：以管理员身份重启 Blender！

name: Main.error.deleteFollowing
en_US:
Faulty CATS installation found!
To fix this delete the following files and folders inside your addons folder:
ko_KR:
잘못 설치된 Cats Plugin이 발견되었습니다!
이 문제를 해결하려면 addons 폴더에서 다음 파일과 폴더를 삭제하세요.:
cn_CN:
检测到 CATS 插件安装损坏！
修复方法：删除插件文件夹内的以下文件及文件夹！

name: Main.error.installViaPreferences
en_US:
Faulty CATS installation found!
Please install CATS via User Preferences and restart Blender!
ko_KR:
잘못 설치된 Cats Plugin이 발견되었습니다!
사용자 환경 설정(User Preferences)을 통해 CATS를 설치하고 블렌더를 다시 시작하세요!
cn_CN:
检测到 CATS 插件安装损坏！
请通过用户偏好设置安装 CATS 插件并重启 Blender！

name: Main.error.restartAndEnable
en_US:
Faulty CATS installation was found and fixed!
Please restart Blender and enable CATS again!
ko_KR:
잘못된 설치된 Cats Plugin 발견됐고 수정되었습니다!
Blender를 다시 시작하고 Cats Plugin를 다시 활성화하세요!
cn_CN:
检测到 CATS 插件安装损坏，已完成修复！
请重启 Blender 并重新启用 CATS 插件！

name: Main.error.unsupportedVersion
en_US:
Blender versions older than 2.79 are not supported by Cats. 
Please use Blender 2.79 or later.
ko_KR:
2.79 이전의 블렌더 버전은 Cats에서 지원하지 않습니다. 
Blender 2.79 버전 이상을 사용하세요.
cn_CN:
CATS 插件不支持 2.79 以下版本的 Blender
请使用 2.79 及更高版本。

name: Main.error.beta2.80
en_US:
You are still on the beta version of Blender 2.80!
Please update to the release version of Blender 2.80.
ko_KR:
아직 Blender 2.80 베타 버전을 사용 중입니다!
Blender를 2.80 정식 버전으로 업데이트하세요.
cn_CN:
你当前使用的是 Blender 2.80 测试版！
请更新至 Blender 2.80 正式版。

name: Main.error.restartAndEnable_alt
en_US: Please restart Blender and enable CATS again!
ko_KR: Blender를 다시 시작하고 Cats Plugin를 다시 활성화하세요!
cn_CN: 请重启 Blender 并重新启用 CATS 插件！

name: FixArmature.desc
en_US:
Automatically:
- Reparents bones
- Removes unnecessary bones, objects and groups
- Translates and renames bones & objects
- Merges weight paints
- Corrects the hips
- Joins meshes
- Converts morphs into shapes
- Corrects shading
ko_KR:
자동으로 아래의 항목들이 고쳐집니다:
- 본들의 부모 재설정
- 필요하지 않는 본들, 오브젝트들, 그룹들과 컨스트레인트들을 제거
- 본들과 오브젝트들을 영어로 번역하고 이름들을 바꿈
- 웨이트 페인트들을 통합
- 'hips'본을 고침
- 메쉬 통합
- morphs를 shapes로 변환
- 쉐이딩을 고침
cn_CN:
本功能将自动执行：
- 重新设置骨骼父子关系
- 移除冗余骨骼、对象和组
- 统一重命名并转换骨骼与对象标识
- 合并权重绘制信息
- 修正臀部骨骼绑定
- 合并网格
- 将变形效果转换为形状键
- 修正着色效果

name: FixArmature.error.noMesh
en_US:
No mesh inside the armature found!
If there are meshes outside of the armature,
set the armature as the parent of the meshes.
ko_KR:
뼈대(Armature) 안에 메쉬가 없습니다!
만약 뼈대 밖에 메쉬들이 있다면,
그 뼈대를 메쉬들의 부모로 설정하세요.
cn_CN:
未在骨骼对象中检测到网格！
若网格独立于骨骼存在
请将骨骼设置为该网格的父对象。

name: FixArmature.error.faultyUV1
en_US: The model was successfully fixed, but there were {uvcoord} faulty UV coordinates.
ko_KR: 모델이 성공적으로 고쳐졌지만, 잘못된 UV 좌표들이 있습니다. {uvcoord}
cn_CN: 模型已成功修复，但仍发现 {uvcoord} 个异常 UV 坐标。

name: FixArmature.error.faultyUV2
en_US: This could result in broken textures and you might have to fix them manually.
ko_KR: 이것은 텍스처를 망가뜨리는 결과를 불러올 수 있으며 당신이 그것들을 직접 손봐야할 수 있습니다.
cn_CN: 该问题可能导致纹理破损，需手动修复。

name: FixArmature.error.faultyUV3
en_US: This issue is often caused by edits in PMX editor.
ko_KR: 이 이슈는 자주 PMX editor에서 편집할 경우 일어날 수 있습니다.
cn_CN: 此问题多由 PMX 编辑器中的编辑操作引发。

name: PoseToShape.desc
en_US:
This saves your current pose as a new shape key.
The new shape key will be at the bottom of your shape key list of the mesh
ko_KR:
이것은 당신의 현재 포즈를 새로운 쉐이프키로 만듭니다.
새로운 쉐이프키는 메쉬의 쉐이프키 리스트의 제일 아래에 생성됩니다.
cn_CN: 将当前骨骼姿态另存为新的形状键，该形状键将出现在网格的形状键列表末尾

name: PoseNamePopup.label
ja_JP: このシェイプキーに名前を付ける:

name: PoseNamePopup.desc
en_US: Sets the shapekey name. Press anywhere outside to skip
ko_KR: 쉐이프키 이름을 설정합니다. 스킵하려면 아무 곳이나 누르세요.
cn_CN: 设置形状键名称，点击空白处可跳过命名

name: PoseNamePopup.success
en_US: Pose successfully saved as shape key.
cn_CN: 姿态已成功另存为形状键。

name: PoseToRest.label
ja_JP: レストポーズとして適用する

name: PoseToRest.desc
en_US:
This applies the current pose position as the new rest position.

If you scale the bones equally on each axis the shape keys will be scaled correctly as well!
WARNING: This can have unwanted effects on shape keys, so be careful when modifying the head with this
ko_KR:
이것은 현재 포즈를 새로운 기본 포즈로 적용합니다.

만약 당신이 뼈들의 스케일을 각 축마다 동일하게 조절했다면 쉐이프키들 또한 올바르게 적용될 것입니다!
경고: 이것은 쉐이프키에 원치 않는 영향을 줄 수 있기 때문에, 이걸로 머리를 수정할 경우 조심하세요.
cn_CN: 将当前骨骼姿态设为新的绑定姿态。若对骨骼进行等轴缩放，形状键也将同步完成等比例缩放！警告：该操作可能对形状键产生不良影响，修改头部骨骼时请谨慎使用

name: PoseToRest.success
en_US: Pose successfully applied as rest pose.
cn_CN: 当前姿态已成功应用为绑定姿态。

name: JoinMeshes.desc
en_US:
Joins all meshes of this model together.
It also:
  - Reorders all shape keys correctly
  - Applies all transforms
  - Repairs broken armature modifiers
  - Applies all decimation and mirror modifiers
  - Merges UV maps correctly
ko_KR:
모델의 모든 메쉬들을 통합시킵니다.
또한:
  - 모든 쉐이프키들의 순서를 올바르게 재설정합니다.
  - 모든 변환(Transforms)을 적용
  - 망가진 아마추어 모디파이어들(armature modifiers)을 고침
  - 모든 데시메이션(decimation)과 미러 모디파이어들(mirror modifiers)을 적용
  - UV맵들을 올바르게 통합
cn_CN:
合并模型的所有网格对象，同时执行：
- 重新整理形状键顺序
- 应用所有变换操作
- 修复损坏的骨骼修改器
- 应用减面、镜像修改器
- 正确合并 UV 贴图

name: JoinMeshesSelected.label
ja_JP: 選択したメッシュを結合する

name: JoinMeshesSelected.desc
en_US:
Joins all selected meshes of this model together.
It also:
  - Reorders all shape keys correctly
  - Applies all transforms
  - Repairs broken armature modifiers
  - Applies all decimation and mirror modifiers
  - Merges UV maps correctly
ko_KR:
모델의 모든 메쉬들을 통합시킵니다.
또한:
  - 모든 쉐이프키들의 순서를 올바르게 재설정합니다.
  - 모든 변환(Transforms)을 적용
  - 망가진 아마추어 모디파이어들(armature modifiers)을 고침
  - 모든 데시메이션(decimation)과 미러 모디파이어들(mirror modifiers)을 적용
  - UV맵들을 올바르게 통합
cn_CN:
合并模型中所有选中的网格对象，同时执行：
- 重新整理形状键顺序
- 应用所有变换操作
- 修复损坏的骨骼修改器
- 应用减面、镜像修改器
- 正确合并 UV 贴图

name: JoinMeshesSelected.error.noSelect
en_US: No meshes selected! Please select the meshes you want to join in the hierarchy!
ko_KR: 선택된 메쉬들이 없습니다! 합치고 싶은 메쉬들을 계층(Hierarchy) 창에서 선택해주세요!
cn_CN: 未选中任何网格！请在层级面板中选择需要合并的网格！

name: JoinMeshesSelected.error.cantJoin
en_US: Selected meshes could not be joined!

name: SeparateByMaterials.desc
en_US:
Separates selected mesh by materials.

Warning: Never decimate something where you might need the shape keys later (face, mouth, eyes..)
ko_KR:
선택된 메쉬를 매테리얼 별로 나눕니다.

경고: 나중에 쉐이프키가 필요한 것들은 절대 데시메이트하지 마십시오. (얼굴, 입, 눈 등..)
cn_CN: 将选中网格按材质分离。警告：切勿对后续需保留形状键的部位（面部、嘴巴、眼球等）执行此操作

name: SeparateByLooseParts.label
ja_JP: ルーズパーツに分離する

name: SeparateByLooseParts.desc
en_US:
Separates selected mesh by loose parts.
This acts like separating by materials but creates more meshes for more precision
ko_KR:
선택된 메쉬를 느슨한 부분들별로 나눕니다.
이것은 매테리얼별로 분리시키는 것과 같지만 보다 높은 정확도를 위해 더 많은 메쉬들을 만듭니다
cn_CN: 将选中网格按松散部件分离，效果与按材质分离类似，但会生成更多网格以提高操作精度

name: SeparateByShapekeys.label
ja_JP: シェイプキーに区切る

name: SeparateByShapekeys.desc
en_US:
Separates selected mesh into two parts,
depending on whether it is effected by a shape key or not.

Very useful for manual decimation
ko_KR:
선택된 메쉬를 두 부분으로 나누는데,
쉐이프키에 의해 영향을 받는지 여부에 따라 결정됩니다.

수동으로 데시메이션을 할 시 매우 유용합니다
cn_CN: 将选中网格按是否受形状键影响拆分为两个部分，对手动减面操作极具帮助

name: SeparateByCopyProtection.label
ja_JP: コピープロテクションに分離する

name: SeparateByCopyProtection.desc
en_US:
Separates selected mesh into two parts,
depending on whether it is effected by the Cats Copy Protection or not.

Useful if you have the Copy Protection enabled on multiple selected parts of your model
ko_KR:
선택된 메쉬를 두 부분으로 나누는데,
Cats의 복사핵 방지의 영향을 받는지 여부에 따라 결정됩니다.

모델의 여러 부분에서 복사 방지를 활성화 한 경우 유용합니다.
cn_CN: 将选中网格按是否受 CATS 复制保护影响拆分为两个部分，适用于对模型多个选中部位启用了复制保护的场景

name: SeparateByX.error.multipleMesh
en_US:
Multiple meshes found!
Please select the mesh you want to separate!
ko_KR:
여러 메쉬들이 발견됨!
나누고 싶은 메쉬를 선택해주세요!
cn_CN: 检测到多个网格对象！请选择需要分离的单个网格！

name: SeparateByX.warn.noSeparation
en_US: No meshes had to be separated!
cn_CN: 无需分离任何网格对象！

name: MergeWeights.label
ja_JP: 親に重みをマージする

name: MergeWeights.desc
en_US:
Deletes the selected bones and adds their weight to their respective parents.

Only available in Edit or Pose Mode with bones selected
cn_CN: 删除选中的骨骼，并将其权重值合并至对应的父级骨骼。仅在骨骼编辑或姿态模式下且选中骨骼时可用

name: MergeWeights.success
en_US: Deleted {number} bones and added their weights to their parents.
cn_CN: 已删除 {number} 根骨骼，并将权重合并至对应父级。

name: MergeWeightsToActive.label
ja_JP: ウェイトをアクティブ にマージする
cn_CN: 将权重合并至活动骨骼

name: MergeWeightsToActive.desc
en_US:
Deletes the selected bones except the active one and adds their weights to the active bone.
The active bone is the one you selected last.

Only available in Edit or Pose Mode with bones selected
cn_CN: 删除除活动骨骼外的所有选中骨骼，并将其权重值合并至活动骨骼，活动骨骼为最后选中的骨骼。仅在骨骼编辑或姿态模式下且选中骨骼时可用

name: MergeWeightsToActive.success
en_US: Deleted {number} bones and added their weights to the active bone.
cn_CN: 已删除 {number} 根骨骼，并将权重合并至活动骨骼。

name: ApplyTransformations.desc
en_US: Applies the position, rotation and scale to the armature and it's meshes
cn_CN: 将位置、旋转和缩放参数应用至骨骼及其关联网格

name: ApplyAllTransformations.label
ja_JP: すべての変換を適用する

name: ApplyAllTransformations.desc
en_US: Applies the position, rotation and scale of all objects
cn_CN: 将位置、旋转和缩放参数应用至所有对象

name: RemoveZeroWeightBones.label
ja_JP: ゼロ ウェイト ボーンを削除する

name: RemoveZeroWeightBones.desc
en_US:
Cleans up the bones hierarchy, deleting all bones that don't directly affect any vertices
Don't use this if you plan to use 'Fix Model'
cn_CN:
清理骨骼层级结构，删除所有未直接影响任何顶点的骨骼。
若计划使用「修复模型」功能，请勿执行此操作

name: RemoveZeroWeightBones.success
cn_CN: 已删除 {number} 根零权重骨骼。

name: RemoveZeroWeightGroups.label
ja_JP: ゼロ ウェイトの頂点グループを削除

name: RemoveZeroWeightGroups.desc
en_US: Cleans up the vertex groups of all meshes, deleting all groups that don't directly affect any vertices
cn_CN: 清理所有网格的顶点组，删除所有未直接影响任何顶点的顶点组

name: RemoveZeroWeightGroups.success
cn_CN: 已移除 {number} 个零权重顶点组。

name: RemoveConstraints.desc
en_US: Removes constrains between bones causing specific bone movement as these are not used by VRChat
cn_CN: 移除骨骼间的约束关系（此类约束会控制骨骼特定运动，而 VRChat 不支持该功能）

name: RecalculateNormals.desc
en_US:
Makes normals point inside of the selected mesh.

Don't use this on good looking meshes as this can screw them up.
Use this if there are random inverted or darker faces on the mesh
cn_CN:
将选中网格的法向量统一朝向网格内部。
若网格显示效果正常，请勿执行此操作，否则可能导致网格显示异常

name: RecalculateNormals.success
cn_CN: 已重新计算所有法向量。

name: FlipNormals.desc
en_US:
Flips the direction of the faces' normals of the selected mesh.
Use this if all normals are inverted
cn_CN:
翻转选中网格所有面的法向量方向。
若网格所有法向量均为反向时，可执行此操作

name: RemoveDoubles.desc
en_US:
Merges duplicated faces and vertices of the selected meshes.
This is more safe than doing it manually:
  - leaves shape keys completely untouched
  - but removes less doubles overall
ko_KR:
선택한 메시의 중복 면들(faces)과 점(vertices)을 병합합니다.
This is more safe than doing it manually:
  - leaves shape keys completely untouched
  - but removes less doubles overall
cn_CN:
合并选中网格中重复的面与顶点
此操作比手动执行更安全：
- 完全保留形状键不受影响
- 但整体移除的重复顶点数量会更少

name: RemoveDoubles.success
cn_CN: 已合并 {number} 个重复顶点。

name: RemoveDoublesNormal.label
ja_JP: ダブルを通常どおりに削除する

name: RemoveDoublesNormal.desc
en_US:
Merges duplicated faces and vertices of the selected meshes.
This is exactly like doing it manually
ko_KR:
선택한 메시의 중복 면들(faces)과 점(vertices)을 병합합니다.
This is exactly like doing it manually
cn_CN:
合并选中网格中重复的面与顶点
效果与手动执行该操作完全一致

name: RemoveDoublesNormal.success
cn_CN: 已合并 {number} 个重复顶点。

name: FixVRMShapesButton.label
ja_JP: コイカツシェイプキーを修正

name: FixVRMShapesButton.desc
en_US: Fixes the shapekeys of Koikatsu models
cn_CN: 修复恋活模型的形状键异常问题

name: FixVRMShapesButton.success
cn_CN: 已修复 VRM 模型形状键。

name: FixFBTButton.desc
en_US:
WARNING: This fix is no longer needed for VRChat, you should not use it!

Applies a general fix for Full Body Tracking.
Ignore the "Spine length zero" warning in Unity
cn_CN:
警告：该修复功能对 VRChat 已无实际作用，请勿使用！
为全身追踪功能执行通用修复操作
可忽略 Unity 中出现的「脊柱长度为零」警告

name: FixFBTButton.error.bonesNotFound
en_US:
Required bones could not be found!
Please make sure that your armature contains the following bones:
 - Hips, Spine, Left leg, Right leg
Exact names are required!
cn_CN:
未检测到所需骨骼！
请确保你的骨骼对象包含以下骨骼：
- 臀部、脊柱、左腿、右腿
骨骼名称必须完全一致！

name: FixFBTButton.error.alreadyApplied
en_US: Full Body Tracking Fix already applied!

name: FixFBTButton.success
en_US: Successfully applied the Full Body Tracking fix.
cn_CN: 全身追踪修复已成功应用。

name: RemoveFBTButton.label
ja_JP: 全身追跡の修正を削除

name: RemoveFBTButton.desc
en_US:
Removes the fix for Full Body Tracking, since it is no longer advised to use it.

Requires bones:
 - Hips, Spine, Left leg, Right leg, Left leg 2, Right leg 2
cn_CN:
移除全身追踪相关修复效果（因该功能现已不建议使用）
执行此操作需包含以下骨骼：
- 臀部、脊柱、左腿、右腿、左小腿、右小腿

name: RemoveFBTButton.error.bonesNotFound
en_US:
Required bones could not be found!
Please make sure that your armature contains the following bones:
 - Hips, Spine, Left leg, Right leg, Left leg 2, Right leg 2
Exact names are required!
cn_CN:
未检测到所需骨骼！
请确保你的骨骼对象包含以下骨骼：
- 臀部、脊柱、左腿、右腿、左小腿、右小腿
骨骼名称必须完全一致！

name: RemoveFBTButton.error.notApplied
en_US: The Full Body Tracking Fix is not applied!

name: RemoveFBTButton.success
en_US: Successfully removed the Full Body Tracking fix.
cn_CN: 全身追踪修复已成功移除。

name: DuplicateBonesButton.desc
en_US: Duplicates the selected bones including their weight and renames them to _L and _R
cn_CN: 复制选中的骨骼，包含其权重信息，并将复制后的骨骼重命名为左、右标识

name: DuplicateBonesButton.success
cn_CN: 已成功复制 {number} 根骨骼。

name: MergeArmature.desc
en_US:
Merges the selected merge armature into the base armature.
You should fix both armatures with Cats first.
Only move the mesh of the merge armature to the desired position, the bones will be moved automatically
cn_CN:
将选中的待合并骨骼合并至基础骨骼中
建议先使用 CATS 插件分别修复两个骨骼对象
仅需将待合并骨骼的关联网格移动至目标位置，骨骼会自动同步位置

name: MergeArmature.error.notFound
en_US: The armature "{name}" could not be found.

name: MergeArmature.error.checkTransforms
en_US:
Please make sure that the parent of the merge armature has the following transforms:
 - Location at 0
 - Rotation at 0
 - Scale at 1
cn_CN:
请确保待合并骨骼的父对象变换参数为以下状态：
- 位置坐标为 0
- 旋转角度为 0
- 缩放比例为 1

name: MergeArmature.error.pleaseFix
en_US:
Please use the "Fix Model" feature on the selected armatures first!
Make sure to select the armature you want to fix above the "Fix Model" button!
After that please only move the mesh (not the armature!) to the desired position.
cn_CN:
请先对选中的骨骼对象执行「修复模型」功能！
请在「修复模型」按钮上方选中需要修复的骨骼对象！
完成修复后，仅移动网格对象（不要移动骨骼！）至目标位置即可。

name: AttachMesh.desc
en_US:
Attaches the selected mesh to the selected bone of the selected armature.

INFO: The mesh will only be assigned to the selected bone.
E.g.: A jacket won't work, because it requires multiple bones
cn_CN:
将选中的网格绑定至选中骨骼对象的指定骨骼上
说明：该网格将仅被分配至选中的单个骨骼
示例：夹克类模型不适用此操作，因其需要多个骨骼共同驱动

name: AttachMesh.success
cn_CN: 网格已成功绑定至骨骼对象。

name: merge_armatures.error.transformReset
en_US:
If you want to rotate the new part, only modify the mesh instead of the armature,
or select "Apply Transforms"!

The transforms of the merge armature got reset and the mesh you have to modify got selected.
Now place this selected mesh where and how you want it to be and then merge the armatures again.
If you don't want that, undo this operation.
cn_CN:
若需旋转新增的模型部件，仅修改网格对象即可，请勿修改骨骼对象
或直接执行「应用变换」操作！
待合并骨骼的变换参数已重置，且已选中需要编辑的网格对象。
请将该选中的网格对象调整至目标位置与角度，随后重新执行骨骼合并操作。
若无需此操作，可撤销当前步骤。

name: merge_armatures.error.pleaseUndo
en_US: Something went wrong! Please undo, check your selections and try again.
cn_CN: 操作执行失败！请撤销操作，检查选中对象后重新尝试。

name: EnableSMC.label
ja_JP: マテリアルコンバイナを有効にする

name: AtlasHelpButton.label
ja_JP: 材料リストを生成する

name: AtlasHelpButton.success
cn_CN: 图集使用帮助文档已打开。

name: InstallShotariya.label
ja_JP: マテリアルコンバイナ読み込み中にエラーが発生しました:
ko_KR: 매테리얼 통합기를 로드하는 중 오류 발생:
cn_CN: 加载材质合并器时发生错误：

name: InstallShotariya.error.install2
en_US: The plugin 'Material Combiner' by Shotariya is required for this function.
cn_CN: 此功能需要依赖 Shotariya 开发的「材质合并器」插件。

name: InstallShotariya.error.install3
en_US: Please download and install it manually:

name: InstallShotariya.error.enable2
en_US: The plugin 'Material Combiner' by Shotariya is required for this function.
cn_CN: 此功能需要依赖 Shotariya 开发的「材质合并器」插件。

name: InstallShotariya.error.enable3
en_US: Please enable it in your User Preferences.
cn_CN: 请在用户偏好设置中启用该插件。

name: InstallShotariya.error.version2
en_US: The latest version is required for this function.
cn_CN: 此功能需要使用该插件的最新版本。

name: InstallShotariya.error.version3
en_US: Please download and install it manually:

name: ShotariyaButton.label
ja_JP: マテリアルコンバイナーをダウンロード

name: ShotariyaButton.success
cn_CN: 材质合并器下载链接已打开

name: BoneMergeButton.desc
en_US:
Merges the given percentage of bones together.
This is useful to reduce the amount of bones used by Dynamic Bones.
cn_CN:
按设定比例合并多个骨骼
此操作可有效减少动态骨骼的骨骼使用数量

name: CopyProtectionEnable.desc
en_US:
Protects your model from piracy. NOT a 100% safe protection!
Read the documentation before use
cn_CN:
为模型开启防盗用保护机制，并非 100% 安全！
使用前请先阅读官方文档

name: CopyProtectionDisable.desc
en_US: Removes the copy protections from this model.
cn_CN: 移除模型上的复制保护机制

name: ForumButton.label
ja_JP: フォーラムに移動する

name: DiscordButton.label
cn_CN: 加入我们的 Discord 社群

name: ScanButton.label
ja_JP: デシメーション モデルのスキャン

name: AddShapeButton.desc
en_US:
Adds the selected shape key to the whitelist.
This means that every mesh containing that shape key will be not decimated.
cn_CN:
将选中的形状键加入白名单
加入后，所有包含该形状键的网格均不会被减面处理

name: AddMeshButton.desc
en_US:
Adds the selected mesh to the whitelist.
This means that this mesh will be not decimated.
cn_CN:
将选中的网格加入白名单
加入后，该网格不会被减面处理

name: RemoveShapeButton.desc
en_US:
Removes the selected shape key from the whitelist.
This means that this shape key is no longer decimation safe!
cn_CN:
将选中的形状键从白名单中移除
移除后，该形状键不再受减面保护

name: RemoveMeshButton.desc
en_US:
Removes the selected mesh from the whitelist.
This means that this mesh will be decimated.
cn_CN:
将选中的网格从白名单中移除
移除后，该网格会被进行减面处理

name: AutoDecimateButton.desc
en_US:
This will automatically decimate your model while preserving the shape keys.
You should manually remove unimportant meshes first.
cn_CN:
自动对模型执行减面操作，同时保留形状键
建议先手动移除非重要网格后再执行此操作

name: decimate.cantDecimateWithSettings
en_US: This model can not be decimated to {number} tris with the specified settings.
cn_CN: 无法按当前设置将模型减面至 {number} 个三角面。

name: decimate.safeTryOptions
en_US: Try to use Custom, Half or Full Decimation.
cn_CN: 建议使用自定义减面、半量减面或全量减面功能

name: decimate.halfTryOptions
en_US: Try to use Custom or Full Decimation.
cn_CN: 建议使用自定义减面或全量减面功能

name: decimate.customTryOptions
en_US: Select fewer shape keys and/or meshes or use Full Decimation.
cn_CN: 请减少选中的形状键和 / 或网格数量，或直接使用全量减面

name: decimate.disableFingersOrIncrease
en_US: Disable 'Save Fingers' or increase the Tris Count.
cn_CN: 禁用「保留手指」功能，或提高三角面数上限

name: decimate.noDecimationNeeded
en_US: The model already has less than {number} tris. Nothing had to be decimated.
cn_CN: 模型三角面数已经少于 {number}，无需执行减面。

name: decimate.cantDecimate1
en_US: The model could not be decimated to {number} tris.
cn_CN: 无法将模型减面至 {number} 个三角面。

name: decimate.cantDecimate2
en_US: It got decimated as much as possible within the limits.
cn_CN: 已在限制范围内执行最大程度减面

name: CreateEyesButton.label
ja_JP: アイトラッキングを作成する

name: CreateEyesButton.desc
en_US:
This will let you track someone when they come close to you and it enables blinking.
You should do decimation before this operation.
Test the resulting eye movement in the 'Testing' tab.
ko_KR:
누군가가 가까이 왔을 때 그 사람을 추적 할 수 있고 눈 깜박임을 가능하게합니다.
데시메이션이 필요하다면 이 작업 이전에 해야합니다.
눈 움직임을 'Testing' 탭에서 테스트하세요.
cn_CN:
实现近距离视线追踪与眨眼动画效果
建议先执行减面操作，再创建眼球追踪
可在「测试」标签页中测试眼球运动效果

name: CreateEyesButton.error.noShapeSelected
en_US:
You have no shape keys selected.
Please choose a mesh containing shape keys or check "Disable Eye Blinking".
ko_KR:
선택된 쉐이프키가 없습니다.
쉐이프키가 포함 된 메쉬를 선택하거나 "눈 깜빡임 비활성화"에 체크하세요.
cn_CN:
未选中任何形状键
请选择包含形状键的网格，或勾选「禁用眼球眨眼」选项

name: CreateEyesButton.error.noVertex
en_US:
The bone "{bone}" has no existing vertex group or no vertices assigned to it.
This might be because you selected the wrong mesh or the wrong bone.
Also make sure that the selected eye bones actually move the eyes in pose mode.
cn_CN:
骨骼「{bone}」没有对应顶点组，或顶点组中没有分配顶点。
这通常是因为选错了眼部网格或骨骼。
请确认所选眼部骨骼在姿态模式下确实能驱动眼球。

name: CreateEyesButton.error.dontUse
en_US:
Please do not use "{eyeName}" as the input bone.
If you are sure that you want to use that bone please rename it to "{eyeNameShort}".
cn_CN:
请不要将「{eyeName}」作为输入骨骼。
如果确实需要使用该骨骼，请先将其重命名为「{eyeNameShort}」。

name: CreateEyesButton.error.hierarchy
en_US:
Eye tracking will not work unless the bone hierarchy is exactly as following: Hips > Spine > Chest > Neck > Head
Furthermore the mesh containing the eyes has to be called "Body" and the armature "Armature".
cn_CN:
骨骼层级结构不符合要求，眼球追踪功能无法生效，要求层级为：臀部 > 脊柱 > 胸部 > 颈部 > 头部
同时，包含眼球的网格必须命名为「Body」，骨骼对象必须命名为「Armature」

name: StartTestingButton.desc
en_US:
This will let you test how the eye movement will look ingame.
Don't forget to stop the Testing process afterwards.
Bones "LeftEye" and "RightEye" are required.
cn_CN:
测试眼球在游戏内的运动效果
测试完成后请务必停止测试进程
需存在「LeftEye」和「RightEye」骨骼

name: StopTestingButton.error.tryAgain
en_US: Something went wrong. Please try eye testing again.
cn_CN: 操作异常，请重新尝试眼球测试

name: AdjustEyesButton.desc
en_US:
Lets you re-adjust the movement range of the eyes.
This gets saved
cn_CN:
重新调整眼球的运动范围
该设置将被保存

name: AdjustEyesButton.error.noVertex
en_US:
The bone "{bone}" has no existing vertex group or no vertices assigned to it.
This might be because you selected the wrong mesh or the wrong bone.
Also make sure to join your meshes before creating eye tracking and make sure that the eye bones actually move the eyes in pose mode.
cn_CN:
骨骼「{bone}」没有对应顶点组，或顶点组中没有分配顶点。
这通常是因为选错了眼部网格或骨骼。
创建眼球追踪前请先合并网格，并确认眼部骨骼在姿态模式下确实能驱动眼球。

name: StartIrisHeightButton.label
ja_JP: アイリスの高さの調整を開始

name: StartIrisHeightButton.desc
en_US:
Lets you readjust the distance of the iris from the eye ball.
Use this to fix clipping of the iris into the eye ball.
This gets saved.
cn_CN:
重新调整虹膜与眼球的间距
用于修复虹膜嵌入眼球的显示问题
该设置将被保存

name: TestBlinking.desc
en_US: This lets you see how eye blinking will look in-game.
ko_KR: 게임 중에 눈 깜박임이 어떻게 보이는 지 확인할 수 있습니다.
cn_CN: 预览眨眼动画在游戏内的显示效果

name: TestLowerlid.desc
en_US: This lets you see how lowerlids will look in-game.
ko_KR: 게임 중에 아래 눈꺼풀이 어떻게 보이는 지 확인할 수 있습니다.
cn_CN: 预览下眼睑在游戏内的显示效果

name: ResetBlinkTest.desc
cn_CN: 重置眨眼动画的测试状态

name: ImportAnyModel.label
ja_JP: 任意のモデルをインポート

name: ImportAnyModel.desc2.79
en_US:
Import a model of any supported type.

Supported types:
- MMD: .pmx/.pmd
- XNALara: .xps/.mesh/.ascii
- Source: .smd/.qc
- VRM: .vrm
- FBX .fbx 
- DAE: .dae 
- ZIP: .zip
cn_CN:
导入所有支持格式的模型
支持格式：
- MMD：.pmx/.pmd
- XNALara：.xps/.mesh/.ascii
- Source：.smd/.qc
- VRM：.vrm
- FBX：.fbx
- DAE：.dae
- ZIP：.zip

name: ImportAnyModel.desc2.8
en_US:
Import a model of any supported type.

Supported types:
- MMD: .pmx/.pmd
- XNALara: .xps/.mesh/.ascii
- Source: .smd/.qc/.vta/.dmx
- VRM: .vrm
- FBX: .fbx
- DAE: .dae 
- ZIP: .zip
cn_CN:
导入所有支持格式的模型
支持格式：
- MMD：.pmx/.pmd
- XNALara：.xps/.mesh/.ascii
- Source：.smd/.qc/.vta/.dmx
- VRM：.vrm
- FBX：.fbx
- DAE：.dae
- ZIP：.zip

name: ImportAnyModel.importantInfo.label
ja_JP: 重要な情報(ここにホバー)
cn_CN: 重要说明（鼠标悬停查看）

name: ImportAnyModel.importantInfo.desc
en_US: If you want to modify the import settings, use the button next to the Import button.
cn_CN: 若需修改导入设置，请点击导入按钮旁的设置按钮

name: ImportAnyModel.error.emptyZip
en_US: The selected zip file contains no importable models.
cn_CN: 选中的压缩包内无可用导入的模型

name: ImportAnyModel.error.unsupportedFBX
en_US:
The FBX file version is unsupported!
Please use a tool such as the "Autodesk FBX Converter" to make it compatible.
cn_CN:
不支持当前 FBX 文件版本！
请使用「Autodesk FBX 转换器」等工具转换为兼容版本

name: ZipPopup.desc
en_US: Shows the models contained in the zip files
cn_CN: 显示压缩包内包含的所有模型

name: ZipPopup.selectModel1
en_US: Select which model you want to import

name: get_zip_content.choose
cn_CN: 是否从压缩包「{zipName}」中导入模型「{model}」？

name: ModelsPopup.label
en_US: Select which you want to import:
ja_JP: インポートする項目を選択します:

name: InstallXPS.label
en_US: XPS Tools is not installed or enabled!
ja_JP: XPS ツールがインストールされていないか、有効になっていない!
cn_CN: 未安装或未启用 XPS 工具插件！

name: InstallSource.label
en_US: Source Tools is not installed or enabled!
ja_JP: ソース ツールがインストールされていないか、有効になっていません!
cn_CN: 未安装或未启用 Source 工具插件！

name: InstallVRM.label
en_US: VRM Importer is not installed or enabled!
ja_JP: VRMインポーターがインストールされていないか、有効になっていません!
cn_CN: 未安装或未启用 VRM 导入插件！

name: InstallX.pleaseInstall1
en_US: If it is not enabled please enable it in your User Preferences.
cn_CN: 若已安装请在用户偏好设置中启用该插件

name: InstallX.pleaseInstall2
en_US: If it is not installed please download and install it manually.
cn_CN: 若未安装请手动下载并安装

name: InstallX.pleaseInstall3
en_US: Make sure to install the version for Blender {blenderVersion}
cn_CN: 请确认安装的是适用于 Blender {blenderVersion} 的版本。

name: InstallX.pleaseInstallTesting
en_US: Currently you have to select 'Testing' in the addons settings.
cn_CN: 目前需要在插件设置中勾选「测试版」选项

name: EnableMMD.label
ja_JP: Mmd_toolsが有効になっていません!

name: EnableMMD.required1
en_US: The plugin "mmd_tools" is required for this function.

name: XpsToolsButton.label
ja_JP: XPSツールをダウンロード
cn_CN: 下载 XPS 工具插件

name: XpsToolsButton.success
cn_CN: XPS 工具插件下载链接已打开

name: SourceToolsButton.label
ja_JP: ソースツールをダウンロード
cn_CN: 下载 Source 工具插件

name: SourceToolsButton.success
cn_CN: Source 工具插件下载链接已打开

name: VrmToolsButton.label
ja_JP: VRMインポーターをダウンロード
cn_CN: 下载 VRM 导入插件

name: VrmToolsButton.success
cn_CN: VRM 导入插件下载链接已打开

name: ExportModel.label
ja_JP: モデルのエクスポート

name: ExportModel.desc
en_US:
Export this model as .fbx for Unity.

Automatically sets the optimal export settings
cn_CN:
将模型导出为 Unity 兼容的.fbx 格式
自动配置最优导出参数

name: ExportModel.error.notEnabled
en_US: FBX Exporter not enabled! Please enable it in your User Preferences.
cn_CN: 未启用 FBX 导出器！请在用户偏好设置中启用

name: ErrorDisplay.polygons2
en_US: You have {number} tris in this model, but you shouldn't have more than 70,000!
cn_CN: 当前模型有 {number} 个三角面，建议不要超过 70000 个。

name: ErrorDisplay.polygons3
en_US: You should decimate before you export this model.
cn_CN: 请先执行减面操作，再导出模型

name: ErrorDisplay.materials2
cn_CN: 当前模型有 {number} 个材质。

name: ErrorDisplay.materials3
en_US: You should try to have a maximum of 4 materials on your model.
cn_CN: 模型材质数量建议不超过 4 个

name: ErrorDisplay.materials4
en_US: Creating a texture atlas in CATS is very easy, so please make use of it.
cn_CN: 在 CATS 插件中创建纹理图集操作简单，建议充分使用该功能

name: ErrorDisplay.meshes2
cn_CN: 当前模型有 {number} 个网格对象。

name: ErrorDisplay.meshes3
en_US: It is not very optimized and might cause lag for you and others!
cn_CN: 模型优化程度不足，可能导致自身及他人端运行卡顿

name: ErrorDisplay.meshes3_alt
en_US: It is extremely unoptimized and will cause laugh for you and others!
cn_CN: 模型优化程度极差，将导致自身及他人端严重卡顿

name: ErrorDisplay.meshes4
en_US: You should always join your meshes, it's very easy:
cn_CN: 建议务必合并模型网格，操作方法十分简单：

name: ErrorDisplay.brokenShapekeys2
cn_CN: 当前模型有 {number} 个损坏的形状键：

name: ErrorDisplay.brokenShapekeys3
en_US: You will not be able to upload this model until you fix these shapekeys.
cn_CN: 修复该问题前，模型无法完成上传

name: ErrorDisplay.brokenShapekeys4
en_US: Either delete or repair them before export.
cn_CN: 请在导出前删除或修复损坏的形状键

name: ErrorDisplay.textures2
en_US: This model has no textures assigned but you have 'Embed Textures' enabled.
cn_CN: 当前模型未分配任何纹理，但已启用「嵌入纹理」功能

name: ErrorDisplay.textures3
en_US: Therefore, no textures will be embedded into the FBX.
cn_CN: 因此，将无任何纹理被嵌入至 FBX 文件中

name: ErrorDisplay.textures4
en_US: This is not an issue, but you will have to import the textures manually into Unity.
cn_CN: 该情况不属于错误，但你需要手动将纹理导入至 Unity 中

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes1
cn_CN: 眼球所在网格未命名为 Body！

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes2
en_US: The mesh '{name}' has Eye Tracking shapekeys but is not named 'Body'.
cn_CN: 网格「{name}」包含眼球追踪形状键，但未命名为 Body。

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes2_alt
en_US: Multiple meshes have Eye Tracking shapekeys but are not named 'Body'.
cn_CN: 多个网格包含眼球追踪形状键，但均未命名为 Body

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes3
en_US: If you want Eye Tracking to work, rename this mesh to 'Body'.
cn_CN: 若需启用眼球追踪功能，请将该网格重命名为 Body

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes3_alt
en_US: Make sure that the mesh containing the eyes is named 'Body' in order
cn_CN: 请确保包含眼球的网格命名为 Body

name: ErrorDisplay.eyes4_alt
en_US: to get Eye Tracking to work.
cn_CN: 以正常使用眼球追踪功能

name: OneTexPerMatButton.label
ja_JP: 1つのマテリアルテクスチャ

name: OneTexPerMatButton.desc
en_US: Have all material slots ignore extra texture slots as these are not used by VRChat.
cn_CN: 让所有材质槽忽略额外纹理槽，VRChat 不支持该类纹理槽

name: OneTexPerMatOnlyButton.label
ja_JP: 1つのマテリアルテクスチャ

name: OneTexPerMatOnlyButton.desc
en_US:
Have all material slots ignore extra texture slots as these are not used by VRChat.
Also removes the textures from the material instead of disabling it.
This makes no difference, but cleans the list for the perfectionists
cn_CN:
让所有材质槽忽略额外纹理槽，VRChat 不支持该类纹理槽
同时从材质中移除冗余纹理，而非仅禁用
此操作无实际功能差异，仅为追求极致整洁的用户清理纹理列表

name: ToolsMaterial.error.notCompatible
en_US: This function is not yet compatible with Blender 2.8!
cn_CN: 该功能暂未兼容 Blender 2.8 版本！

name: OneTexPerXButton.success
en_US: All materials have one texture now.
cn_CN: 所有材质现已仅保留单个纹理

name: StandardizeTextures.label
ja_JP: テクスチャを標準化する

name: StandardizeTextures.desc
en_US:
Enables Color and Alpha on every texture, sets the blend method to Multiply
and changes the materials transparency to Z-Transparency
cn_CN:
为所有纹理启用颜色与透明度通道，将混合模式设为正片叠底
并将材质透明度模式修改为 Z 轴透明度

name: StandardizeTextures.success
cn_CN: 所有纹理现已完成标准化处理

name: CombineMaterialsButton.label
ja_JP: 同じマテリアルを組み合わせる

name: CombineMaterialsButton.desc
en_US:
Combines similar materials into one, reducing draw calls.
Your avatar should visibly look the same after this operation.
This is a very important step for optimizing your avatar.
If you have problems with this, please tell us!
cn_CN:
将相似材质合并为一个，减少绘制调用次数
执行此操作后，化身的视觉显示效果应无变化
这是优化化身的关键步骤
若使用该功能时遇到问题，请向我们反馈！

name: ConvertAllToPngButton.label
cn_CN: 将纹理转换为 PNG 格式

name: ConvertAllToPngButton.desc
en_US:
Converts all texture files into PNG files.
This helps with transparency and compatibility issues.

The converted image files will be saved next to the old ones
cn_CN:
将所有纹理文件转换为 PNG 格式
该操作可解决透明度及兼容性相关问题
转换后的图片文件将保存在原纹理文件同级目录下

name: ConvertAllToPngButton.success
cn_CN: 已将 {number} 个纹理转换为 PNG 文件。

name: RootButton.label
ja_JP: 親のボーンに接続する

name: RootButton.desc
en_US:
This will duplicate the parent of the bones and reparent them to the duplicate.
Very useful for Dynamic Bones.
cn_CN:
复制骨骼的父级骨骼，并将原骨骼重新绑定至复制后的父级骨骼
该功能对动态骨骼的设置十分实用

name: RefreshRootButton.desc
en_US: This will clear the group bones list cache and rebuild it, useful if bones have changed or your model.
cn_CN: 清空骨骼组列表缓存并重新构建，适用于骨骼或模型发生修改的场景

name: RefreshRootButton.success
en_US: Root bones refreshed, check the root bones list again.
cn_CN: 根骨骼列表已刷新，请重新查看根骨骼列表

name: RevertChangesButton.desc
en_US: Revert the changes back to how they were on Blender start-up.
ko_KR: 변경 사항을 Blender 시작했을 때의 설정으로 되돌립니다.
cn_CN: 将所有设置还原至 Blender 启动时的初始状态

name: ResetGoogleDictButton.label
ja_JP: ローカルのGoogle翻訳をクリア
cn_CN: 清除本地谷歌翻译数据

name: ResetGoogleDictButton.desc
en_US: Deletes all currently saved Google Translations. You can't undo this
ko_KR: 현재 저장된 모든 Google 번역을 삭제합니다. 이 작업은 취소 할 수 없습니다.
cn_CN: 删除所有当前已保存的谷歌翻译数据，该操作不可撤销

name: ResetGoogleDictButton.resetInfo
cn_CN: 本地谷歌翻译词典已清空！

name: DebugTranslations.desc
en_US:
Tests Google translations and prints the response into a file called 'google-response.txt' located in the cats addon folder > resources
This button is only visible in the cats development version
cn_CN:
测试谷歌翻译功能，并将返回结果输出至 CATS 插件文件夹 > resources 目录下的 google-response.txt 文件中
该按钮仅在 CATS 插件开发版本中显示

name: DebugTranslations.error
cn_CN: 检测到错误，翻译结果已输出！

name: DebugTranslations.success
en_US: No issues with Google Translations found, response printed!
cn_CN: 未检测到谷歌翻译功能异常，翻译结果已输出！

name: ShapeKeyApplier.label
ja_JP: 選択したシェイプキーをBasisに適用
cn_CN: 将选中形状键应用至基础形状键

name: ShapeKeyApplier.desc
en_US: Applies the selected shape key to the new Basis at it's current strength and creates a reverted shape key from the selected one
cn_CN: 将选中的形状键按当前强度应用至新的基础形状键，并基于该形状键创建反向形状键

name: ShapeKeyApplier.error.revertCustomBasis
en_US:
To revert the shape keys, please apply the "Reverted" shape keys in reverse order.
Start with the shape key called "{name}".

If you didn't change the shape key order, you can revert the shape keys from top to bottom.
cn_CN:
若需还原自定义基础形状键，请按倒序应用所有「反向」形状键。
先从名为「{name}」的形状键开始。

如果未修改形状键排序，可从上至下依次还原。

name: ShapeKeyApplier.error.revert
en_US:
To revert the shape keys, please apply the "Reverted" shape keys in reverse order.
Start with the reverted shape key that uses the relative key called "Basis".

If you didn't change the shape key order, you can revert the shape keys from top to bottom.
cn_CN:
若需还原形状键，请按倒序应用所有「反向」形状键
从引用基础形状键的反向形状键开始操作
若你未修改过形状键的排序，可从上至下依次还原形状键

name: ShapeKeyApplier.successRemoved
en_US: Successfully removed shapekey "{name}" from the Basis.
cn_CN: 已从基础形状键中移除「{name}」。

name: ShapeKeyApplier.successSet
en_US: Successfully set shapekey "{name}" as the new Basis.
cn_CN: 已将「{name}」设置为新的基础形状键。

name: addToShapekeyMenu.ShapeKeyApplier.label
ja_JP: 選択したシェイプキーをBasisに適用
cn_CN: 将选中形状键应用至基础形状键

name: DynamicPatronButton.desc
cn_CN: 这是一位超棒的赞助者

name: register_dynamic_buttons.desc
cn_CN: 维护版已移除赞助者列表：{name}

name: TranslateShapekeyButton.label
ja_JP: シェイプキーを翻訳する

name: TranslateShapekeyButton.desc
en_US: Translates all shape keys using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates all shape keys using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 쉐이프키들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有形状键翻译为英文

name: TranslateBonesButton.desc
en_US: Translates all bones using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates all bones using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 본들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有骨骼翻译为英文

name: TranslateObjectsButton.label
ja_JP: メッシュとオブジェクトを翻訳する

name: TranslateObjectsButton.desc
en_US: Translates all meshes and objects using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates all meshes and objects using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 메쉬와 오브젝트들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有网格和对象翻译为英文

name: TranslateObjectsButton.success
cn_CN: 已翻译 {number} 个网格与对象。

name: TranslateMaterialsButton.label
ja_JP: マテリアルを翻訳する

name: TranslateMaterialsButton.desc
en_US: Translates all materials using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates all materials using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 매테리얼들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有材质翻译为英文

name: TranslateTexturesButton.label
ja_JP: テクスチャを翻訳する

name: TranslateTexturesButton.desc
en_US: Translates all textures using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates all textures using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 텍스처들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有纹理翻译为英文

name: TranslateTexturesButton.error.noInternet
en_US: Could not connect to Google. Please check your internet connection.
ko_KR: 구글에 연결하지 못했습니다. 인터넷 연결을 확인해주세요.
cn_CN: 无法连接至谷歌服务器，请检查你的网络连接

name: TranslateAllButton.desc
en_US: Translates everything using the internal dictionary and Google Translate into English
ja_JP: Translates everything using the internal dictionary and Google Translate
ko_KR: 모든 것들을 내장된 사전과 구글번역을 이용해 영어로 번역합니다.
cn_CN: 通过内置词典及谷歌翻译将所有内容翻译为英文

name: TranslateX.error.wrongVersion
en_US: You need Blender 2.79 or higher for this function.
ko_KR: 이 기능을 사용하려면 Blender 2.79 이상의 버전이 필요합니다.
cn_CN: 该功能需要 Blender 2.79 或更高版本支持

name: update_dictionary.error.cantConnect
en_US: Could not connect to Google. Some parts could not be translated.
ko_KR: 구글에 연결하지 못했습니다. 일부분은 번역되지 못했습니다.
cn_CN: 无法连接至谷歌服务器，部分内容未完成翻译

name: update_dictionary.error.temporaryBan
en_US: It looks like you got banned from Google Translate temporarily!
ko_KR: 일시적으로 Google 번역에서 차단 된 것 같습니다!
cn_CN: 你的 IP 地址疑似被谷歌翻译临时封禁！

name: update_dictionary.error.catsTranslated
en_US: Cats translated what it could with the local dictionary, but you will have to try again later for the Google translations.
ko_KR: Cats Plugin은 자체 내장된 로컬 사전으로 번역 할 수 있지만 나중에 Google 번역을 하려면 나중에 다시 시도해야합니다.
cn_CN: CATS 插件已通过本地词典完成可翻译内容的翻译，谷歌翻译相关内容请稍后重新尝试

name: update_dictionary.error.cantAccess
en_US: Cats was not able to access Google Translate!
ko_KR: Cats는 Google 번역에 액세스 할 수 없습니다!
cn_CN: CATS 插件无法访问谷歌翻译服务！

name: update_dictionary.error.errorMsg
en_US: You got an error message from Google Translate!
cn_CN: 收到谷歌翻译的错误反馈！

name: update_dictionary.error.apiChanged
en_US:
Could not get translations from Google Translate!
This means that Google changed their API and translations will no longer work until this is fixed.
Please translate manually or wait for an CATS update.
For updates and dicussions please join our Discord. The link can be found in the Credits panel down below.
ko_KR:
Google 번역에서 번역을 가져올 수 없습니다!
이는 Google이 API를 변경했으며 문제가 해결 될 때까지 번역이 더 이상 작동하지 않음을 의미합니다.
수동으로 번역하거나 Cats 업데이트를 기다리십시오.
업데이트 및 토론을 원하시면 Discord에 가입해주세요. 링크는 아래의 크레딧 패널에서 찾을 수 있습니다.
cn_CN:
无法从谷歌翻译获取翻译结果！
该问题通常为谷歌翻译 API 更新导致，在插件完成适配前，翻译功能将无法使用
请手动完成翻译，或等待 CATS 插件更新
有关更新及问题讨论，可加入我们的 Discord 社群，链接见下方鸣谢面板

name: AutoVisemeButton.desc
en_US:
This will give your avatar the ability to mimic each sound that comes from your mouth by blending between various shapes to mimic your actual voice.
It will generate 15 shape keys from the 3 shape keys you specify
ko_KR:
당신의 아바타가 다양한 쉐이프키들을 조합하여 실제 음성을 모방하여 말하는 것처럼 보이게 합니다.
3개의 쉐이프키를 지정하여 새로운 15 종류의 쉐이프키들을 생성합니다.
cn_CN:
为化身添加口型同步功能，通过混合多种面部形状模拟发声时的嘴部动作
基于你指定的 3 个形状键，自动生成 15 个口型形状键

name: AutoVisemeButton.error.selectShapekeys
en_US: Please select the correct mouth shapekeys instead of "Basis"!
ko_KR: "Basis" 대신에 올바른 입모양 쉐이프키들을 선택하여 주세요!
cn_CN: 请选择正确的嘴部形状键，请勿选择基础形状键！

name: AutoVisemeButton.success
cn_CN: 嘴部口型动画创建完成！

name: Scene.armature.desc
en_US: Select the armature which will be used by Cats
cn_CN: 选择 CATS 插件将使用的骨骼对象

name: Scene.zip_content.label
ja_JP: コンテンツを圧縮する

name: Scene.zip_content.desc
en_US: Select the model you want to import

name: Scene.keep_upper_chest.desc
en_US:
VRChat now partially supports the Upper Chest bone, so deleting it is no longer necessary.

Uncheck this if you are going to use the legacy SDK2 avatar system. Most people can leave this on.
ko_KR:
VRChat은 이제 상단 가슴(Upper Chest) 본을 부분적으로 지원하므로 더 이상 삭제할 필요가 없습니다.

경고: 현재 이것은 눈 추적(Eye Tracking)을 망치기 때문에, 눈 추적을 원한다면 이것을 체크하지 말아주세요.
cn_CN:
VRChat 现已部分支持上胸部骨骼，无需再删除该骨骼
若你仍使用旧版 SDK2 化身系统，请取消勾选此选项，多数用户保持勾选即可

name: Scene.combine_mats.label
ja_JP: 同じマテリアルを組み合わせる
cn_CN: 合并相同材质（功能待修复）

name: Scene.combine_mats.desc
en_US:
Combines similar materials into one, reducing draw calls.

Your avatar should visibly look the same after this operation.
This is a very important step for optimizing your avatar.
If you have problems with this, uncheck this option and tell us!
ko_KR:
유사한 매테리얼들을 하나로 결합하여 드로우 콜을 줄입니다.

이 작업 후에도 아바타는 동일하게 보일 것입니다.
이것은 아바타를 최적화하는 데 매우 중요한 단계입니다.
이것에 문제가 있으면이 옵션을 선택 취소하고 우리에게 알려주세요!
cn_CN:
将相似材质合并为单个材质，减少绘制调用次数
执行此操作后，化身的视觉显示效果应无变化
这是优化化身的关键步骤
若使用该功能出现问题，请取消勾选并向我们反馈！

name: Scene.remove_zero_weight.label
ja_JP: ゼロウェイトボーンを削除する

name: Scene.remove_zero_weight.desc
en_US:
Cleans up the bones hierarchy, deleting all bones that don't directly affect any vertices.
Uncheck this if bones or vertex groups that you want to keep got deleted
ko_KR:
본 구조를 정리하고 어느 Vertex에도 영향을 주지 않는 모든 본들을 지웁니다.
유지하려는 본들이나 버텍스 그룹이 지워질 경우 체크해제하세요
cn_CN:
清理骨骼层级结构，删除所有未直接影响任何顶点的骨骼
若你需要保留的骨骼或顶点组被误删，请取消勾选此选项

name: Scene.keep_end_bones.desc
en_US:
Saves end bones from deletion.

This can improve skirt movement for dynamic bones, but increases the bone count.
This can also fix issues with crumbled finger bones in Unity.
Make sure to always uncheck "Add Leaf Bones" when exporting or use the CATS export button
ko_KR:
엔드 본들을 유지합니다.

다이나믹본을 사용하는 스커트의 움직임을 향상시키지만 본의 개수를 늘려버립니다.
이것은 Unity에서 부서진 손가락 뼈들과 관련된 문제를 해결할 수도 있습니다.
내보내기 할때는 언제나 "Add Leaf Bones"을 체크해제하거나 Cats의 내보내기(Export) 버튼을 사용하세요
cn_CN:
防止末端骨骼被删除
该设置可提升动态骨骼驱动的裙摆运动效果，但会增加骨骼数量
同时可修复 Unity 中手指骨骼扭曲的问题
导出时请务必取消勾选「添加叶骨骼」选项，或直接使用 CATS 插件的导出按钮

name: Scene.keep_twist_bones.label
ja_JP: ツイストボーンを保持

name: Scene.keep_twist_bones.desc
en_US:
This will keep any bone with "Twist" in the name.
So if there are certain bones that you want to keep, you can add "Twist" to them and they won't get deleted.

VRChat can now make use of twist bones, so you can use this option to keep them
ko_KR:
이름에 "Twist"가 들어간 본들을 유지합니다.
따라서 유지하려는 특정 뼈가있는 경우 이름에 "Twist"를 추가 할 수 있으며 삭제되지 않습니다.

VRChat은 이제 트위스트 본을 사용할 수 있으므로 이 옵션을 사용하여 유지할 수 있습니다.
cn_CN:
保留所有名称中包含「Twist」的骨骼
若你需要保留特定骨骼，可在其名称中添加「Twist」，避免被删除
VRChat 现已支持扭曲骨骼，你可通过此选项保留该类骨骼

name: Scene.fix_twist_bones.label
ja_JP: MMDツイスト ボーンを修正する
cn_CN: 修复 MMD 扭曲骨骼

name: Scene.fix_twist_bones.desc
en_US:
This will make MMD arm twist bones usable in VRChat.
WIll only work if the twist bones are properly named.
Required names:
  - ArmTwist[1-3]_[L/R]
  - HandTwist[1-3]_[L/R]

You don't need to enable "Keep Twist Bones" for this to work
ko_KR:
VRChat에서 MMD 팔 트위스트 뼈대를 사용할 수 있습니다.
트위스트 본의 이름이 올바르게 지정된 경우에만 작동합니다.
필요한 이름형식:
  - ArmTwist[1-3]_[L/R]
  - HandTwist[1-3]_[L/R]

이 작업을 위해 "Keep Twist Bones"를 활성화 할 필요가 없습니다.
cn_CN:
让 MMD 的手臂扭曲骨骼可在 VRChat 中正常使用
该功能仅对命名规范的扭曲骨骼生效
骨骼命名要求：
- 手臂扭曲骨骼：ArmTwist [1-3]_[左 / 右]
- 手部扭曲骨骼：HandTwist [1-3]_[左 / 右]
使用该功能无需启用「保留扭曲骨骼」选项

name: Scene.join_meshes.desc
en_US:
Joins all meshes of this model together.
It also:
  - Applies all transformations
  - Repairs broken armature modifiers
  - Applies all decimation and mirror modifiers
  - Merges UV maps correctly

INFO: You should always join your meshes
ko_KR:
모델의 모든 메쉬들을 통합합니다.
또한:
  - 모든 쉐이프키들의 순서를 올바르게 재설정합니다.
  - 모든 변환(Transforms)을 적용
  - 망가진 아마추어 모디파이어들(armature modifiers)을 고침
  - 모든 데시메이션(decimation)과 미러 모디파이어들(mirror modifiers)을 적용
  - UV맵들을 올바르게 통합
cn_CN:
合并模型的所有网格对象
同时执行以下操作：
- 应用所有变换参数
- 修复损坏的骨骼修改器
- 应用所有减面及镜像修改器
- 正确合并 UV 贴图
说明：建议你始终合并模型的网格对象

name: Scene.connect_bones.desc
en_US:
This connects all bones to their child bone if they have exactly one child bone.
This will not change how the bones function in any way, it just improves the aesthetic of the armature
ko_KR:
모든 본들이 정확히 하나의 자식 본을 가지고 있다면 모든 본들을 그것들의 자식 본과 연결시켜줍니다.
뼈의 기능에는 영향을 주지 않으며 뼈대(armature)의 미관을 개선할 뿐입니다.
cn_CN:
若某根骨骼仅有一个子骨骼，将该骨骼与子骨骼进行连接
该操作不会改变骨骼的任何功能，仅优化骨骼对象的视觉显示效果

name: Scene.fix_materials.label
ja_JP: マテリアルを修正する

name: Scene.fix_materials.desc
en_US: This will apply some VRChat related fixes to materials
ko_KR: 매테리얼에 일부 VRChat 관련 픽스가 적용됩니다.
cn_CN: 针对 VRChat 的使用要求，对材质进行相关修复

name: Scene.remove_rigidbodies_joints.label
ja_JP: リジッドボディとジョイントを除去

name: Scene.remove_rigidbodies_joints.desc
en_US:
Rigidbodies and joints are used by MMD software to simulate physics.
They are completely useless for VRChat, so removing them is recommended for VRChat users!
ko_KR:
Rigidbodies와 joints는 MMD software에서 물리연산을 위해 사용되는 것들입니다.
VRChat에 사용되지않으므로 VRChat 유저들에게는 이것들을 지우는 게 좋습니다!
cn_CN:
刚体和关节组件是 MMD 软件中用于物理模拟的功能
该功能在 VRChat 中完全无用，建议 VRChat 用户删除！

name: Scene.use_google_only.label
ja_JP: 古い翻訳を使用する(推奨しません)
cn_CN: 使用旧版翻译规则（不推荐）

name: Scene.use_google_only.desc
en_US:
Ignores the internal dictionary and only uses the Google Translator for shape key translations.

This will result in slower translation speed and worse translations, but the translations will be like in CATS version 0.9.0 and older.
Only use this if you have animations which rely on the old translations and you don't want to convert them to the new ones
ko_KR:
내장된 사전 대신에 구글 번역기를 쉐이프키 번역에 사용합니다.

번역 속도가 느려지고 번역의 질이 더 나빠질 수 있지만, 번역은 CATS 0.9.0 버전 혹은 그 이전의 버전처럼 될 것이다.
이전 번역에 의존하는 애니메이션을 새 번역으로 변환하지 않을 경우에만 이 기능을 사용하세요.
cn_CN:
忽略插件内置词典，仅通过谷歌翻译完成形状键的翻译
该设置会降低翻译速度且翻译效果更差，但翻译结果与 CATS 0.9.0 及更早版本一致
仅当你有依赖旧版翻译结果的动画、且不愿将其适配新版翻译时，才建议使用此选项

name: Scene.show_more_options.label
ja_JP: その他のオプションを表示

name: Scene.show_more_options.desc
cn_CN: 展开更多模型设置选项

name: Scene.merge_mode.armature.label
ja_JP: アーマチュアをマージ

name: Scene.merge_mode.armature.desc
en_US: Here you can merge two armatures together.
cn_CN: 可在此处将两个骨骼对象合并为一个

name: Scene.merge_mode.mesh.label
ja_JP: メッシュを取り付ける

name: Scene.merge_mode.mesh.desc
en_US: Here you can attach a mesh to an armature.
cn_CN: 可在此处将网格绑定至骨骼对象

name: Scene.merge_armature_into.desc
en_US: Select the armature into which the other armature will be merged
cn_CN: 选择作为合并目标的基础骨骼对象

name: Scene.merge_armature.label
ja_JP: メッシュを取り付ける

name: Scene.merge_armature.desc
en_US: Select the armature which will be merged into the selected armature above
cn_CN: 选择需要合并至上方选中骨骼的待合并骨骼对象

name: Scene.attach_to_bone.desc
en_US: Select the bone to which the armature will be attached to
cn_CN: 选择待合并骨骼将绑定到的目标骨骼

name: Scene.attach_mesh.label
ja_JP: メッシュを取り付ける

name: Scene.attach_mesh.desc
en_US: Select the mesh which will be attached to the selected bone in the selected armature
cn_CN: 选择需要绑定至选中骨骼对象中指定骨骼的网格对象

name: Scene.merge_same_bones.label
ja_JP: すべてのボーンをマージ

name: Scene.merge_same_bones.desc
en_US:
Merges all bones together that have the same name instead of only the base bones (Hips, Spine, etc).
You will have to make sure that all the bones you want to merge have the same name.

If this is checked, you won't need to fix the model with CATS beforehand but it is still advised to do so.
If this is unchecked, CATS will only merge the base bones (Hips, Spine, etc).

This can have unintended side effects, so check your model afterwards!
cn_CN:
合并所有名称相同的骨骼，而非仅合并基础骨骼（臀部、脊柱等）
你需要确保所有需要合并的骨骼名称完全一致
勾选此选项后，无需提前使用 CATS 插件修复模型，但仍建议执行修复操作
取消勾选此选项，CATS 插件将仅合并基础骨骼（臀部、脊柱等）
该操作可能产生意外副作用，合并后请仔细检查模型！

name: Scene.apply_transforms.desc
en_US:
Check this if both armatures and meshes are already at their correct positions.
This will cause them to stay exactly where they are when merging
cn_CN:
若两个骨骼对象及对应网格已处于正确位置，请勾选此选项
勾选后，合并过程中将保留对象的当前位置

name: Scene.merge_armatures_join_meshes.desc
en_US:
This will join all meshes.
Not checking this will always apply transforms
cn_CN:
合并所有网格对象
取消勾选此选项时，将强制应用所有变换参数

name: Scene.merge_armatures_remove_zero_weight_bones.label
ja_JP: ゼロウェイトボーンを削除する

name: Scene.merge_armatures_remove_zero_weight_bones.desc
en_US:
Cleans up the bones hierarchy, deleting all bones that don't directly affect any vertices.
Uncheck this if bones or vertex groups that you want to keep got deleted
cn_CN:
清理骨骼层级结构，删除所有未直接影响任何顶点的骨骼
若你需要保留的骨骼或顶点组被误删，请取消勾选此选项

name: Scene.decimation_mode.smart.desc
en_US:
Best results - repair shape keys after decimation

This will decimate your whole model and attempt to undo the warping caused by Blender's decimation.
This will give the best results and keep blinking and lip syncing, but may have issues on some models.
ko_KR:
최고의 결과 - 데시메이션 이후 쉐이프키들을 복구함

This will decimate your whole model and attempt to undo the warping caused by Blender's decimation.
This will give the best results and keep blinking and lip syncing, but may have issues on some models.
cn_CN:
效果最优 —— 减面后修复形状键
对整个模型执行减面操作，并尝试修正由 Blender 减面功能导致的模型扭曲
该模式减面效果最佳，且能保留眨眼和口型同步功能，但部分模型可能出现兼容问题

name: Scene.decimation_mode.safe.desc
en_US:
Decent results - no shape key loss

This will only decimate meshes with no shape keys.
The results are decent and you won't lose any shape keys.
Eye Tracking and Lip Syncing will be fully preserved.
ko_KR:
괜찮은 결과 - 쉐이프키 손실 없음

This will only decimate meshes with no shape keys.
The results are decent and you won't lose any shape keys.
Eye Tracking and Lip Syncing will be fully preserved.
cn_CN:
效果尚可 —— 无形状键丢失
仅对无形状键的网格执行减面操作
减面效果中规中矩，且不会丢失任何形状键
眼球追踪和口型同步功能将完全保留

name: Scene.decimation_mode.half.desc
en_US:
Good results - minimal shape key loss

This will only decimate meshes with less than 4 shape keys as those are often not used.
The results are better but you will lose the shape keys in some meshes.
Eye Tracking and Lip Syncing should still work.
ko_KR:
나쁘지 않은 결과, - 최소한의 쉐이프키 손실됨

This will only decimate meshes with less than 4 shape keys as those are often not used.
The results are better but you will lose the shape keys in some meshes.
Eye Tracking and Lip Syncing should still work.
cn_CN:
效果良好 —— 形状键少量丢失
仅对形状键数量少于 4 个的网格执行减面操作（此类形状键通常非核心）
减面效果更优，但部分网格的形状键会丢失
眼球追踪和口型同步功能仍可正常使用

name: Scene.decimation_mode.full.desc
en_US:
Consistent results - full shape key loss

This will decimate your whole model deleting all shape keys in the process.
This will give consistent results but you will lose the ability to add blinking and Lip Syncing.
Eye Tracking will still work if you disable Eye Blinking.
ko_KR:
일관된 결과 - 모든 쉐이프키들이 손실됨

This will decimate your whole model deleting all shape keys in the process.
This will give consistent results but you will lose the ability to add blinking and Lip Syncing.
Eye Tracking will still work if you disable Eye Blinking.
cn_CN:
效果稳定 —— 所有形状键丢失
对整个模型执行减面操作，过程中删除所有形状键
减面效果稳定，但模型将无法添加眨眼和口型同步功能
若禁用眼球眨眼功能，眼球追踪仍可正常使用

name: Scene.decimation_mode.custom.desc
en_US:
Custom results - custom shape key loss

This will let you choose which meshes and shape keys should not be decimated.
ko_KR:
커스텀 결과 - 커스텀 쉐이프키 손실

This will let you choose which meshes and shape keys should not be decimated.
cn_CN:
效果自定义 —— 按需保留形状键
可自主选择需要保留、不进行减面的网格和形状键

name: Scene.selection_mode.shapekeys.desc
en_US: Select all the shape keys you want to preserve here.
cn_CN: 在此处选择所有需要保留的形状键

name: Scene.selection_mode.meshes.desc
en_US: Select all the meshes you don't want to decimate here.
cn_CN: 在此处选择所有不需要进行减面的网格

name: Scene.add_shape_key.desc
en_US: The shape key you want to keep

name: Scene.add_mesh.desc
en_US: The mesh you want to leave untouched by the decimation
cn_CN: 需要保留、不执行减面操作的网格

name: Scene.decimate_fingers.desc
en_US:
Check this if you don't want to decimate your fingers!
Results will be worse but there will be no issues with finger movement.
This is probably only useful if you have a VR headset.

This operation requires the finger bones to be named specifically:
Thumb(0-2)_(L/R)
IndexFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
MiddleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
RingFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
LittleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
ko_KR:
손가락의 버텍스를 줄여 망치고 싶지 않다면 이것을 체크하세요!
결과는 더 나빠질 수 있지만 손의 움직임에는 문제가 없습니다.
아마 VR을 사용하는 경우에만 유용 할 것입니다.

이 작업을 수행하려면 손가락과 손 뼈의 이름을 구체적으로 지정해야합니다.
Left/Right wrist
Thumb(0-2)_(L/R)
IndexFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
MiddleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
RingFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
LittleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
cn_CN:
若你不想对指部网格进行减面，请勾选此选项
减面整体效果会下降，但手指的运动效果不会出现任何问题
该设置仅对使用 VR 头显的用户有实际意义
使用该功能要求手指骨骼命名符合以下规范：
拇指：Thumb (0-2)(左 / 右)
食指：IndexFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
中指：MiddleFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
无名指：RingFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
小指：LittleFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)

name: Scene.decimate_hands.desc
en_US:
Check this if you don't want to decimate your full hands!
Results will be worse but there will be no issues with hand movement.
This is probably only useful if you have a VR headset.

This operation requires the finger and hand bones to be named specifically:
Left/Right wrist
Thumb(0-2)_(L/R)
IndexFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
MiddleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
RingFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
LittleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
ko_KR:
손의 버텍스를 줄여 망치고 싶지 않다면 이것을 체크하세요!
결과는 더 나빠질 수 있지만 손의 움직임에는 문제가 없습니다.
아마 VR을 사용하는 경우에만 유용 할 것입니다.

이 작업을 수행하려면 손가락과 손 뼈의 이름을 구체적으로 지정해야합니다.
Left/Right wrist
Thumb(0-2)_(L/R)
IndexFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
MiddleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
RingFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
LittleFinger(1-3)_(L/R)
cn_CN:
若你不想对整个手部网格进行减面，请勾选此选项
减面整体效果会下降，但手部的运动效果不会出现任何问题
该设置仅对使用 VR 头显的用户有实际意义
使用该功能要求手部及手指骨骼命名符合以下规范：
左手 / 右手腕骨
拇指：Thumb (0-2)(左 / 右)
食指：IndexFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
中指：MiddleFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
无名指：RingFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)
小指：LittleFinger (1-3)(左 / 右)

name: Scene.decimation_remove_doubles.desc
en_US: Uncheck this if you get issues with this checked
ja_JP: Uncheck this if you got issues with with this checked
cn_CN: 若勾选此选项后模型出现问题，请取消勾选

name: Scene.decimation_animation_weighting.desc
en_US:
Weight decimation based on shape keys and vertex group overlap
Results in better animating topology by trading off overall shape accuracy
Use if your elbows/joints end up with bad topology
cn_CN:
基于形状键和顶点组重叠情况进行权重减面优化
以牺牲模型整体形状精度为代价，获得更适合动画的拓扑结构
若你的模型手肘或关节部位拓扑结构不佳，建议使用此选项

name: Scene.decimation_animation_weighting_factor.desc
en_US: How much influence the animation weighting has on the overall shape
cn_CN: 动画权重对模型整体形状的影响程度

name: Scene.max_tris.desc
en_US: The target amount of tris after decimation
cn_CN: 减面操作后的目标三角面数量

name: Scene.eye_mode.creation.desc
en_US: Here you can create eye tracking.
cn_CN: 可在此处创建眼球追踪功能

name: Scene.eye_mode.testing.desc
en_US: Here you can test how eye tracking will look in-game.
cn_CN: 可在此处测试眼球追踪在游戏内的显示效果

name: Scene.mesh_name_eye.desc
en_US: The mesh with the eyes vertex groups
cn_CN: 包含眼球顶点组的网格对象

name: Scene.head.desc
en_US: The head bone containing the eye bones
cn_CN: 包含眼球骨骼的头部骨骼对象

name: Scene.wink_left.desc
en_US: The shape key containing a blink with the left eye
cn_CN: 包含左眼眨眼动作的形状键

name: Scene.wink_right.desc
en_US: The shape key containing a blink with the right eye
cn_CN: 包含右眼眨眼动作的形状键

name: Scene.lowerlid_left.desc
en_US:
The shape key containing a slightly raised left lower lid.
Can be set to "Basis" to disable lower lid movement
cn_CN:
包含左下眼睑轻微抬起动作的形状键
可设为基础形状键以禁用下眼睑运动

name: Scene.lowerlid_right.desc
en_US:
The shape key containing a slightly raised right lower lid.
Can be set to "Basis" to disable lower lid movement
cn_CN:
包含右下眼睑轻微抬起动作的形状键
可设为基础形状键以禁用下眼睑运动

name: Scene.disable_eye_movement.label
ja_JP: 目の動きを無効にする

name: Scene.disable_eye_movement.desc
en_US:
IMPORTANT: Do your decimation first if you check this!

Disables eye movement. Useful if you only want blinking.
This creates eye bones with no movement bound to them.
You still have to assign "LeftEye" and "RightEye" to the eyes in Unity
cn_CN:
重要提示：若勾选此选项，请先执行减面操作
禁用眼球的运动功能，适用于仅需保留眨眼效果的场景
此操作将创建无运动绑定的眼球骨骼
仍需在 Unity 中为眼球分配左眼和右眼骨骼标识

name: Scene.disable_eye_blinking.desc
en_US:
Disables eye blinking. Useful if you only want eye movement.
This will create the necessary shape keys but leaves them empty
cn_CN:
禁用眼球的眨眼功能，适用于仅需保留眼球运动的场景
此操作将创建所需的形状键，但会保留其空白状态

name: Scene.eye_distance.desc
en_US:
Higher = more eye movement
Lower = less eye movement
Warning: Too little or too much range can glitch the eyes.
Test your results in the "Eye Testing"-Tab!
cn_CN:
数值越大 = 眼球运动幅度越大
数值越小 = 眼球运动幅度越小
警告：数值过小或过大均可能导致眼球显示异常
请在眼球测试标签页中验证效果

name: Scene.eye_rotation_x.desc
en_US: Rotate the eye bones on the vertical axis
cn_CN: 沿垂直轴旋转眼球骨骼

name: Scene.eye_rotation_y.desc
en_US:
Rotate the eye bones on the horizontal axis.
This is from your own point of view
cn_CN: 沿水平轴旋转眼球骨骼（以你的视角为基准）

name: Scene.iris_height.desc
en_US: Moves the iris away from the eye ball
cn_CN: 调整虹膜与眼球的间距

name: Scene.eye_blink_shape.desc
en_US: Test the blinking of the eye

name: Scene.eye_lowerlid_shape.desc
en_US: Test the lowerlid blinking of the eye
cn_CN: 测试眼球下眼睑的眨眼效果

name: Scene.mesh_name_viseme.desc
en_US: The mesh with the mouth shape keys
cn_CN: 包含嘴部形状键的网格对象

name: Scene.mouth_a.desc
en_US:
Shape key containing mouth movement that looks like someone is saying "aa".
Do not put empty shape keys like "Basis" in here
cn_CN:
包含发 AA 音时嘴部动作的形状键
请勿在此处选择基础形状键等空白形状键

name: Scene.mouth_o.desc
en_US:
Shape key containing mouth movement that looks like someone is saying "oh".
Do not put empty shape keys like "Basis" in here
cn_CN:
包含发 OH 音时嘴部动作的形状键
请勿在此处选择基础形状键等空白形状键

name: Scene.mouth_ch.desc
en_US:
Shape key containing mouth movement that looks like someone is saying "ch". Opened lips and clenched teeth.
Do not put empty shape keys like "Basis" in here
cn_CN:
包含发 CH 音时嘴部动作的形状键（嘴唇张开、牙齿咬紧）
请勿在此处选择基础形状键等空白形状键

name: Scene.shape_intensity.label
ja_JP: シェイプキーミックスの強度

name: Scene.shape_intensity.desc
en_US: Controls the strength in the creation of the shape keys. Lower for less mouth movement strength
cn_CN: 控制形状键生成时的融合强度，数值越小嘴部动作幅度越弱

name: Scene.root_bone.desc
en_US: List of bones that look like they could be parented together to a root bone
cn_CN: 可绑定至同一根根骨骼的骨骼列表

name: Scene.optimize_mode.atlas.desc
en_US: Allows you to make a texture atlas.
cn_CN: 可创建模型的纹理图集

name: Scene.optimize_mode.material.desc
en_US: Some various options on material manipulation.
cn_CN: 包含多项材质编辑相关选项

name: Scene.optimize_mode.bonemerging.desc
en_US: Allows child bones to be merged into their parents.
cn_CN: 可将子骨骼合并至其父级骨骼

name: Scene.merge_ratio.desc
en_US:
Higher = more bones will be merged
Lower = less bones will be merged
cn_CN:
数值越大 = 被合并的骨骼数量越多
数值越小 = 被合并的骨骼数量越少

name: Scene.merge_mesh.desc
en_US: The mesh with the bones vertex groups
cn_CN: 包含骨骼顶点组的网格对象

name: Scene.merge_bone.desc
en_US: List of bones that look like they could be merged together to reduce overall bones
cn_CN: 可合并以减少整体骨骼数量的骨骼列表

name: Scene.show_mmd_tabs.label
cn_CN: 显示 MMD 工具插件面板

name: Scene.show_mmd_tabs.desc
en_US: Allows you to hide/show the mmd_tools tabs "MMD" and "Misc"
cn_CN: 可显示 / 隐藏 MMD 工具插件的 MMD 和杂项标签页

name: Scene.embed_textures.label
ja_JP: エクスポート時にテクスチャを埋め込む

name: Scene.embed_textures.desc
en_US:
Enable this to embed the texture files into the FBX file upon export.
Unity will automatically extract these textures and put them into a separate folder.
This might not work for everyone and it increases the file size of the exported FBX file
cn_CN:
勾选此选项，将在导出时把纹理文件嵌入至 FBX 文件中
Unity 会自动提取这些纹理并保存至独立文件夹
此功能并非对所有用户生效，且会增加导出 FBX 文件的体积

name: Scene.ui_lang.desc
en_US: Lets you select which language the Cats interface should have
cn_CN: 可选择 CATS 插件的界面显示语言

name: Scene.use_custom_mmd_tools.label
cn_CN: 使用自定义 MMD 工具插件

name: Scene.use_custom_mmd_tools.desc
en_US: Enable this to use your own version of mmd_tools. This will disable the internal cats mmd_tools
cn_CN: 勾选此选项以使用自定义版本的 MMD 工具插件，同时将禁用 CATS 插件内置的 MMD 工具插件

name: Scene.debug_translations.desc
en_US: Tests the Google Translations and prints the Google response in case of error
cn_CN: 测试谷歌翻译功能，若出现错误将打印谷歌服务的返回信息

name: Scene.bake_resolution.desc
en_US:
Output resolution for the textures.
- 2048 is typical for desktop use.
- 1024 is reccomended for the Quest
ko_KR:
테스쳐들의 결과 해상도.
- 2048 데스크탑 용
- 1024 퀘스트 용
cn_CN:
纹理的输出分辨率：
- 2048 像素为电脑端使用的标准分辨率
- 1024 像素为 Quest 版的推荐分辨率

name: Scene.bake_use_decimation.desc
en_US: Reduce polycount before baking, then use Normal maps to restore detail
ko_KR: 베이킹하기 전에 폴리 카운트를 줄인 다음 노멀 맵을 사용하여 디테일을 복원합니다.
cn_CN: 烘焙前先降低模型面数，再通过法线贴图还原细节

name: Scene.bake_generate_uvmap.desc
en_US:
Re-pack islands for your mesh to a new non-overlapping UVMap.
Only disable if your UVs are non-overlapping already.
This will leave any map named "Detail Map" alone.
Uses UVPackMaster where available for more efficient UVs, make sure the window is showing
cn_CN:
为网格重新打包 UV 岛，生成无重叠的新 UV 贴图
若当前 UV 已无重叠，可禁用此选项
此操作不会修改名为细节贴图的 UV 层
若安装了 UV 打包大师插件，将使用该插件实现更高效的 UV 打包，需保证该插件窗口处于显示状态

name: Scene.bake_uv_overlap_correction.desc
en_US: Method used to prevent overlaps in UVMap
cn_CN: 用于防止 UV 贴图出现重叠的处理方式

name: Scene.bake_prioritize_face.label
cn_CN: 优先放大头部 / 眼球 UV

name: Scene.bake_prioritize_face.desc
en_US: Scale any UV islands attached to the head/eyes by a given factor.
cn_CN: 按指定比例放大与头部 / 眼球绑定的 UV 岛

name: Scene.bake_face_scale.label
cn_CN: 头部 / 眼球 UV 缩放比例

name: Scene.bake_face_scale.desc
en_US: How much to scale up the face/eyes portion of the textures.
cn_CN: 纹理中面部 / 眼球区域的放大倍数

name: Scene.bake_quick_compare.desc
en_US: Move output avatar next to existing one to quickly compare
cn_CN: 将烘焙后的化身模型移至原模型旁，便于快速对比效果

name: Scene.bake_illuminate_eyes.desc
en_US:
Relight LeftEye and RightEye to be full brightness.
Without this, the eyes will have the shadow of the surrounding socket baked in,
which doesn't animate well
cn_CN:
将左眼和右眼骨骼对应的模型部位重新打光至全亮度
若不执行此操作，眼球将被烘焙入眼窝周围的阴影效果
导致眼球的动画显示效果不佳

name: Scene.bake_pass_smoothness.desc
en_US:
Bakes Roughness and then inverts the values.
To use this, it needs to be packed to the Alpha channel of either Diffuse or Metallic.
Not neccesary if your mesh has a global roughness value
cn_CN:
烘焙粗糙度信息并反转其数值
使用此贴图需将其打包至漫反射或金属度贴图的 Alpha 通道
若模型已设置全局粗糙度值，则无需启用此选项

name: Scene.bake_pass_diffuse.desc
en_US:
Bakes diffuse, un-lighted color. Usually you will want this.
While baking, this temporarily links "Metallic" to "Anisotropic Rotation" as metallic can cause issues.
cn_CN:
烘焙无光照影响的漫反射颜色信息，通常建议启用
烘焙过程中，会临时将金属度贴图关联至各向异性旋转通道，因金属度属性可能导致烘焙异常

name: Scene.bake_preserve_seams.desc
en_US:
Forces the Decimate operation to preserve vertices making up seams, preventing hard edges along seams.
May result in less ideal geometry.
Use if you notice ugly edges along your texture seams.
cn_CN:
强制减面操作保留构成缝合线的顶点，避免缝合线处出现硬边
此操作可能导致模型几何结构不够优化
若发现纹理缝合线处出现明显硬边，可启用此选项

name: Scene.bake_pass_normal.desc
en_US:
Bakes a normal (bump) map. Allows you to keep the shading of a complex object with
the geometry of a simple object. If you have selected 'Decimate', it will create a map
that makes the low res output look like the high res input.
Will not work well if you have self-intersecting islands
cn_CN:
烘焙法线（凹凸）贴图，可让低模模型保留高模模型的着色细节
若勾选了烘焙前减面，将生成对应的法线贴图，使低模还原高模的细节
若 UV 岛存在自相交情况，此功能效果将大打折扣

name: Scene.bake_normal_apply_trans.desc
en_US:
Applies offsets while baking normals. Neccesary if your model has many materials with different normal maps
Turn this off if applying location causes problems with your model
cn_CN:
烘焙法线时应用对象的变换偏移量
若模型包含多个带不同法线贴图的材质，建议启用此选项
若应用位置变换导致模型出现问题，请禁用此选项

name: Scene.bake_pass_ao.desc
en_US:
Bakes Ambient Occlusion, non-projected shadows. Adds a significant amount of detail to your model.
Reccomended for non-toon style avatars.
Takes a fairly long time to bake
cn_CN:
烘焙环境光遮蔽效果（非投影阴影），为模型增加大量细节
非卡通风格化身建议启用
此烘焙过程耗时较长

name: Scene.bake_pass_questdiffuse.label
cn_CN: Quest 版漫反射贴图（颜色 + 环境光遮蔽）

name: Scene.bake_pass_questdiffuse.desc
en_US: Blends the result of the Diffuse and AO bakes to make Quest-compatible shading.
cn_CN: 融合漫反射和环境光遮蔽的烘焙结果，生成适配 Quest 版的着色效果

name: Scene.bake_pass_emit.desc
cn_CN: 烘焙模型的自发光（辉光）效果

name: Scene.bake_diffuse_alpha_pack.desc
en_US: What to pack to the Diffuse Alpha channel
cn_CN: 指定打包至漫反射贴图 Alpha 通道的贴图类型

name: Scene.bake_metallic_alpha_pack.desc
en_US: What to pack to the Metallic Alpha channel
cn_CN: 指定打包至金属度贴图 Alpha 通道的贴图类型

name: Scene.bake_pass_alpha.desc
en_US:
Bakes transparency by connecting the last Principled BSDF Alpha input
to the Base Color input and baking Diffuse.
Not a native pass in Blender, results may vary
Unused if you are baking to Quest
cn_CN:
通过将原理化 BSDF 着色器的最后一个 Alpha 输入口关联至基础颜色输入口，再烘焙漫反射的方式实现透明度烘焙
此并非 Blender 的原生烘焙通道，效果可能存在差异
若烘焙 Quest 版模型，此选项将失效

name: Scene.bake_pass_metallic.desc
en_US:
Bakes metallic by connecting the last Principled BSDF Metallic input
to the Base Color input and baking Diffuse.
Not a native pass in Blender, results may vary
cn_CN:
通过将原理化 BSDF 着色器的最后一个金属度输入口关联至基础颜色输入口，再烘焙漫反射的方式实现金属度烘焙
此并非 Blender 的原生烘焙通道，效果可能存在差异

name: Scene.bake_questdiffuse_opacity.desc
en_US:
The opacity of the shadows to blend onto the Diffuse map.
This should match the unity slider for AO on the Desktop version.
cn_CN:
融合至漫反射贴图的阴影不透明度
该数值应与电脑端 Unity 中环境光遮蔽的滑块数值保持一致

name: Scene.bake_uv_overlap_correction.none.desc
en_US: Leave islands as they are. Use if islands don't self-intersect at all
cn_CN: 保留 UV 岛原有状态。若 UV 岛完全无自相交情况，可使用此选项

name: Scene.bake_uv_overlap_correction.unmirror.desc
en_US: Move all face islands with positive X values over one to un-pin mirrored UVs. Solves most UV pinning issues.
cn_CN: 将所有 X 轴坐标为正的面部 UV 岛整体偏移，解除镜像 UV 的固定状态。可解决绝大多数 UV 固定异常问题

name: Scene.bake_uv_overlap_correction.reproject.desc
en_US: Use blender's Smart UV Project to come up with an entirely new island layout. Tends to reduce quality.
cn_CN: 使用 Blender 的智能 UV 投影功能，生成全新的 UV 岛布局。该方式可能会降低贴图精度

name: Scene.bake_diffuse_alpha_pack.smoothness.desc
en_US: Pack Smoothness. Most efficient if you don't have transparency or metallic textures.
cn_CN: 打包平滑度信息。若模型无透明度或金属度贴图，此方式效率最优

name: Scene.bake_metallic_alpha_pack.smoothness.desc
en_US: Pack Smoothness. Use this if your Diffuse alpha channel is already populated with Transparency
cn_CN: 打包平滑度信息。若漫反射贴图的 Alpha 通道已用于打包透明度信息，可使用此选项

name: cats_bake.warn_missing_nodes
en_US: A material in use isn't using Nodes, fix this in the Shading tab.
cn_CN: 当前使用的材质未启用节点编辑，请在着色标签页中修复该问题

name: cats_bake.preset_desktop.desc
en_US:
Preset for producing an Excellent-rated Desktop avatar, not accounting for bones.
This will try to automatically detect which bake passes are relevant to your model
cn_CN:
用于制作电脑端优秀评级化身的预设（未计入骨骼相关优化）
该预设将自动检测模型适用的烘焙通道

name: cats_bake.preset_quest.desc
en_US:
Preset for producing an Excellent-rated Quest avatar, not accounting for bones.
This will try to automatically detect which bake passes are relevant to your model
cn_CN:
用于制作 Quest 版优秀评级化身的预设（未计入骨骼相关优化）
该预设将自动检测模型适用的烘焙通道

name: cats_bake.bake.desc
en_US:
Perform the bake. Warning, this performs an actual render!
This will create a copy of your avatar to leave the original alone.
Depending on your machine and model, this could take an hour or more.
For each pass, any Value node in your materials labeled bake_<bakename> will be
set to 1.0, for more granular customization.
cn_CN:
执行烘焙操作
警告：此操作将执行实际渲染计算
该操作会复制一份化身模型，避免修改原模型
根据电脑配置和模型复杂度，耗时可能超过一小时
针对每个烘焙通道，材质中所有命名为 bake_<烘焙通道名> 的数值节点
将被设为 1.0，支持更精细化的自定义烘焙

name: cats_bake.error.render_engine
en_US: You need to set your render engine to Cycles first!
cn_CN: 请先将渲染引擎切换为循环渲染！

name: cats_bake.error.render_disabled
en_US: One or more of your armature's meshes have rendering disabled!
cn_CN: 骨骼对象的一个或多个关联网格已禁用渲染！

name: cats_bake.info.success
en_US: Success! Textures and model saved to 'CATS Bake' folder next to your .blend file.
cn_CN: 烘焙成功！纹理及模型已保存至 blend 文件同级目录的 CATS Bake 文件夹中
